notes: Passive - checks if the current URL matches 'instagram.com.*/p/'; if so it opens a new tab at '{origin}/p/{shortcode}media?size=l' to show the full-size image, otherwise alerts 'This is not an Instagram post URL.'. Does not show an in-page modal (opens a new tab), so we only assert no JS errors. target_url is a placeholder post shortcode - the URL match is on the path pattern, not on the post actually existing, so the window.open() call should still fire without throwing.
